variants.title: Donaldson P554925 Lube Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec AS1404
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P554925 Lube Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec AS1404
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Lube Filters? Donaldson lube filters are designed to keep today’s engine lube systems functioning at peak performance. • Keep oil clean by capturing contaminants that cause engine damage. • Include heavy duty components that are built to perform, built to last. • Deliver essential engine protection for maximum cold flow performance.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Outer Diameter: 116.5 mm, Inner Diameter: 56.5 mm, Length: 196.0 mm, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Filtrec AS1404 Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec AS1404. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the AS1404 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Outer Diameter: 116.5 mm, Inner Diameter: 56.5 mm, Length: 196.0 mm, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
